  Manages a Stalwart DNS server used for automatic DNS record management (the DnsServer JMAP object). Supports cloud providers (Cloudflare, DigitalOcean, etc.) via the secret field, and RFC 2136 TSIG via the host, port, key_name, key, protocol, and tsig_algorithm fields.

# stalwart_dns_server (Resource)

Manages a Stalwart DNS server used for automatic DNS record management (the `DnsServer` JMAP object). Supports cloud providers (Cloudflare, DigitalOcean, etc.) via the `secret` field, and RFC 2136 TSIG via the `host`, `port`, `key_name`, `key`, `protocol`, and `tsig_algorithm` fields.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stalwart_dns_server" "cloudflare" {
  type        = "Cloudflare"
  description = "Cloudflare DNS for automatic record management"
  secret      = var.cloudflare_api_token
}

# RFC 2136 TSIG example:
# resource "stalwart_dns_server" "tsig" {
#   type        = "Tsig"
#   description = "Internal BIND server via TSIG"
#   host        = "10.0.0.53"
#   key_name    = "tsig-key."
#   key         = var.tsig_key
# }

# Import an existing DNS server by its opaque id:
# terraform import stalwart_dns_server.cloudflare <opaque-id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the DNS server. Required and must be non-empty.
- `type` (String) DNS provider type, e.g. `Cloudflare`, `Tsig`, `DigitalOcean`. Changing the type replaces the DNS server.

### Optional

- `host` (String) IP address of the authoritative DNS server. Required for `Tsig` type.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded TSIG shared secret. Required for `Tsig` type. Write-only: the server never returns it, so out-of-band changes are not detected.
- `key_name` (String) TSIG key name, e.g. `tsig-key.`. Required for `Tsig` type.
- `polling_interval` (String) Interval between DNS propagation checks (e.g. `10s`). Uses Stalwart duration syntax.
- `port` (Number) Port of the authoritative DNS server (default 53). Used by `Tsig` type.
- `propagation_delay` (String) Initial delay before checking DNS propagation (e.g. `5s`). Uses Stalwart duration syntax.
- `propagation_timeout` (String) Maximum time to wait for DNS propagation (e.g. `2m`). Uses Stalwart duration syntax.
- `protocol` (String) Transport protocol for TSIG DNS updates: `udp` or `tcp` (default `udp`).
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) API token or key used to authenticate with the DNS provider. Used by cloud providers (Cloudflare, DigitalOcean, etc.). Write-only: the server never returns it, so out-of-band changes are not detected.
- `timeout` (String) Request timeout for DNS API calls (e.g. `30s`, `1m`). Uses Stalwart duration syntax.
- `tsig_algorithm` (String) TSIG HMAC algorithm, e.g. `hmac-sha256`, `hmac-sha512` (default `hmac-md5`). Used by `Tsig` type.
- `ttl` (String) TTL to set on managed DNS records (e.g. `300s`, `5m`). Uses Stalwart duration syntax.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the DNS server.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by opaque server-assigned id (DNS servers have no stable human-readable id):
terraform import stalwart_dns_server.cloudflare <opaque-id>
```
